description: CompositionBrown and cream printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a mandarin collar with a slit neck, mock chest placket with buttons, three-quarter sleeves with cream tape detailing on the cuffs, a border at the hem and split side seamsFitRegularWash careWash cold using a mild detergentDo not bleachDry in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsThis elegant kurta from vishudh speaks volumes of your class and exudes femininity with its timeless design and cut. The traditional print is sure to make this a wardrobe favourite. Pair it with leggings or skinny jeans.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'7", chest 33" and waist 25"
